lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਦੀ ਬੂਝੈ ਜਿ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: tis dee boojhai ji gurasabad kamaae |
lines.english: He alone puts out this fire, who practices and lives the Guru's Shabad.
True is the Lord and Master, and True is His glorious greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਨਿਵਾਰੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: tan man seetal krodh nivaare haumai maar samaaeaa |15|
lines.english: His body and mind are cooled and soothed, and his anger is silenced; conquering egotism, he merges in the Lord. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਏਕ ਕਹੈ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਨਾਮੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੧੬॥੧॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: naanak ek kahai benantee naame naam samaaeaa |16|1|23|
lines.english: Nanak offers this one prayer: through the Naam, the Name of the Lord, may I merge in the Lord. ||16||1||23||
By Guru's Grace, a rare few attain this.
Your devotees ever praise You, lovingly focusing on You.
By Your Grace, please unite with Your devotees.
Maaroo, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਉਬਰਹਿ ਕਰਤੇ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tau saranaaee ubareh karate aape mel milaaeaa |1|
lines.english: In Your Sanctuary, they are saved, O Creator Lord; You unite them in Union with Yourself. ||1||
Sublime and exalted is devotion to the Perfect Word of the Shabad.
Peace prevails within; they are pleasing to Your Mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸਚੀ ਭਗਤੀ ਰਾਤਾ ਸਚੇ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: man tan sachee bhagatee raataa sache siau chit laaeaa |2|
lines.english: One whose mind and body are imbued with true devotion, focuses his consciousness on the True Lord. ||2||
In egotism, the body is forever burning.
When God grants His Grace, one meets the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਬੁਝਾਏ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: antar agiaan sabad bujhaae satigur te sukh paaeaa |3|
lines.english: The Shabad dispels the spiritual ignorance within, and through the True Guru, one finds peace. ||3||
The blind, self-willed manmukh acts blindly.
He is in terrible trouble, and wanders in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਕਾ ਜੇਵੜਾ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਕਾਟੈ ਅੰਤੇ ਬਹੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jam kaa jevarraa kade na kaattai ante bahu dukh paaeaa |4|
lines.english: He can never snap the noose of Death, and in the end, he suffers in horrible pain. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਰੈ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਜਾਇ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad marai man maare haumai jaae samaaeaa |5|
lines.english: He dies in the Word of the Guru's Shabad, and conquers his mind; stilling his egotism, he merges in the Lord. ||5||
He keeps the True Name enshrined within his heart.
Through the Shabad, one's comings and goings in reincarnation are ended.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਥਿਰੁ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur thir koe na hoee |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, no one finds permanence and stability.
Coming and going, the people of the world are wasting away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: antar jot sabad sukh vasiaa jotee jot milaaeaa |6|
lines.english: The Shabad shines its Light deep within the self, and one dwells in peace; one's light merges into the Light. ||6||
The five demons think of evil and corruption.
The expanse is the manifestation of emotional attachment to Maya.
Over and over, time and time again, they are drowned.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਤਾ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਪੰਚ ਦੂਤ ਵਸਿ ਆਇਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: satigur seve taa mukat hovai panch doot vas aaeaa |7|
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, one is liberated, and the five demons are put under his control. ||7||
Without the Guru, there is only the darkness of attachment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭੇਟੇ ਸਚੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਏ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: satigur bhette sach drirraae sach naam man bhaaeaa |8|
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, Truth is implanted within, and the True Name becomes pleasing to the mind. ||8||
True is His Door, and True is His Court, His Royal Darbaar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਧੁਨਿ ਸਚੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਾ ਸਚੇ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: sachee dhun sache gun gaavaa sache maeh samaaeaa |9|
lines.english: Singing the Glorious Praises of the True Lord, in the true melody, I am immersed and absorbed in Truth. ||9||
The true ones serve Him, through the Beloved Word of the Shabad.
Deep within the home of the self, one finds the home of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਥੈ ਸੋਗੁ ਵਿਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਵਿਆਪੈ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: othai sog vijog na viaapai sahaje sehaj samaaeaa |10|
lines.english: There, one is not afflicted with sorrow or separation; merge into the Celestial Lord with intuitive ease. ||10||
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, one easily, intuitively finds it.
They wander around, totally attached and thirsty.
The evil people live in the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਸੰਗਤਿ ਬਹਹਿ ਸਦਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਦੁਖੋ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਮਾਇਆ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: kusangat baheh sadaa dukh paaveh dukho dukh kamaaeaa |11|
lines.english: They sit in evil gatherings, and suffer in pain forever; they earn pain, nothing but pain. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਗੁਣ ਰਵਹਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: sahaje gun raveh din raatee jotee jot milaaeaa |12|
lines.english: One who intuitively chants God's Glorious Praises day and night - his light merges into the Light. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੇ ਪਾਰੁ ਨ ਪਾਏ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin sabade paar na paae koee |
lines.english: Without the Shabad, no one can cross over to the other side.
Without the True Guru, there is no Sangat, no Congregation.
It drinks in the Ambrosial Nectar, resting in the Word of the Guru's Shabad.
The body is the tree; the bird of the soul dwells within it.
Purify the body, and contemplate the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਡਹਿ ਨ ਮੂਲੇ ਨ ਆਵਹਿ ਨ ਜਾਹੀ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: auddeh na moole na aaveh na jaahee nij ghar vaasaa paaeaa |13|
lines.english: It never flies away, and it does not come or go; it dwells within the home of its own self. ||13||
Remove the poisonous drug of emotional attachment, and eradicate doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: aape kripaa kare sukhadaataa aape mel milaaeaa |14|
lines.english: The Giver of peace Himself bestows His Mercy, and unites us in Union with Himself. ||14||
